owner_facing_goal: 右键切换一把归当前玩家唯一拥有、由服务端权威驾驶的基础飞剑载具。

behavior.server_client_boundary: Item use, ownership, spawning, mounting, movement, collision, and cleanup run on the logical server. The client sends only a six-key bitset; it sends no position, velocity, entity id, owner id, or look values.
behavior.interaction: Use with no owned sword spawns below the player and mounts them. Use with an owned sword discards it and does not spawn a replacement.
behavior.cooldown_or_durability: No cooldown or durability in v1; max stack size is one.
tests: payload exposes only six control flags
server accepts input only from the bound current passenger
common code imports no client classes

commands: right-click to summon and mount; right-click again to recall
verify W/S, A/D, Space, and Shift while riding
jar_checks: English and Chinese item translation keys
